props.ChoiceText: A license, seal, or right of trade mattered enough to make enemies of neighbors and supplicants of men who normally gave orders.
props.ChoiceBio: A license dispute taught you that paper can sharpen appetite as well as steel.

0.TransitionText: Because a license dispute taught you that paper can sharpen appetite as well as steel, office remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Magistrate, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: A licensed trader or petitioner still comes to you first when seals become uncertain.
